title: Iran focus at Trump-Xi summit may delay progress on tariffs, rare earths
summary_full: Thanks to the Iran war, big issues for U.S. businesses like rare earths and supply chains may take a back seat on the agenda for the Trump-Xi summit.
summary_public: Thanks to the Iran war, big issues for U.S. businesses like rare earths and supply chains may take a back seat on the agenda for the Trump-Xi summit.

IR.label: neutral
IR.evidence: Iran focus at Trump-Xi summit may delay progress
